mapper.select:
SELECT id, dict_name AS dictName, dict_type AS dictType, status, remark, create_time AS createTime FROM sys_dict_type
deleted = 0
AND (dict_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR dict_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
AND status = #{query.status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, dict_name AS dictName, dict_type AS dictType, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted FROM sys_dict_type WHERE dict_type = #{dictType} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
